entries.name: wa-pipeline
entries.intent: Harness pipeline operations — list, get, execute, status, diagnose.

entries.name: wa-report
entries.intent: Generate an ULTRA §13-compliant Work Unit Report from the current session.

entries.name: wa-schedule
entries.intent: Create a Claude Desktop scheduled task via mcp__scheduled-tasks.

entries.name: wa-work-unit
entries.intent: Start a new work unit under ULTRA governance. Defines scope + completion criterion + pre-flight checklist.
